title: Anthropic Wins Accolades From Canada’s AI Minister Over Mythos Approach
snippet: A Canadian cabinet minister praised Anthropic PBC’s decision to introduce its Mythos model to select companies and allow them to test the technology before releasing it more widely.
contentText: A Canadian cabinet minister praised Anthropic PBC’s decision to introduce its Mythos model to select companies and allow them to test the technology before releasing it more widely.

title: AI Chatbots Give Misleading Medical Advice 50% of the Time, Study Finds
snippet: Artificial intelligence-driven chatbots are giving users problematic medical advice about half the time, according to a new study, highlighting the health risks of the technology that’s becoming increasingly integral in…
contentText: Artificial intelligence-driven chatbots are giving users problematic medical advice about half the time, according to a new study, highlighting the health risks of the technology that’s becoming increasingly integral in day-to-day life.

title: Stocks Continue Climb on Iran Peace Push | The Close 4/14/2026
snippet: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Wells Fargo CFO Mike Santomassimo, Commerzban…
contentText: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Wells Fargo CFO Mike Santomassimo, Commerzbank CEO Bettina Orlopp, UBS’ Erika Najarian, Phillips 66 CEO Mark Lashier, Charles Schwab’s Liz Ann Sonders, Stanford University’s Lanhee Chen, Tapestry CEO Joanne Crevoiserat, 23andMe Research Institute CEO Anne Wojcicki, Groot Hospitality Founder David Grutman, & NBA Champion & Entrepreneur Kyle Kuzma. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon-Globalstar Deal Is Poised to Boost Apple’s Satellite Ambitions
snippet: Amazon.com Inc.’s takeover of Globalstar Inc. is poised to benefit one of the company’s biggest rivals in hardware devices: Apple Inc.
contentText: Amazon.com Inc.’s takeover of Globalstar Inc. is poised to benefit one of the company’s biggest rivals in hardware devices: Apple Inc.

title: Meta, Broadcom Deepen Ties on Chips; Tan Departs Meta Board
snippet: Meta Platforms Inc. announced an expanded multibillion-dollar partnership with Broadcom Inc. to design and build custom chips to power the social media giant’s artificial intelligence efforts.
contentText: Meta Platforms Inc. announced an expanded multibillion-dollar partnership with Broadcom Inc. to design and build custom chips to power the social media giant’s artificial intelligence efforts.

title: 23andMe's Anne Wojcicki: Leaning into Direct-To-Consumer
snippet: 23andMe Research Institute Founder & CEO Anne Wojcicki discusses the company’s strategic shift after reacquisition, being early into the DTC movement, and the decision to not actively work with AI firms for the time bei…
contentText: 23andMe Research Institute Founder & CEO Anne Wojcicki discusses the company’s strategic shift after reacquisition, being early into the DTC movement, and the decision to not actively work with AI firms for the time being. She talks with Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Investors Block Out Market Volatility Triggered by War
snippet: It’s been two months since the war in Iran began, with no clear end in sight. But after some initial turbulence, Wall Street seems to be blocking out the noise.
contentText: It’s been two months since the war in Iran began, with no clear end in sight. But after some initial turbulence, Wall Street seems to be blocking out the noise.

title: Amazon’s $11.6 Billion Globalstar Deal Amps Up Rivalry With Musk
snippet: Amazon.com Inc.’s $11.6 billion deal to buy Globalstar Inc. ramps up competition with Elon Musk’s Starlink in satellite communications, a market predicted to double to $200 billion in the coming years.
contentText: Amazon.com Inc.’s $11.6 billion deal to buy Globalstar Inc. ramps up competition with Elon Musk’s Starlink in satellite communications, a market predicted to double to $200 billion in the coming years.

title: Lumen CEO Says AI Bots Are Taking Over the Internet
snippet: Over half of the planet’s internet traffic is now made up of AI bots, according to Kate Johnson, chief executive officer of enterprise network giant Lumen Technologies Inc., forcing executives across sectors to rethink…
contentText: Over half of the planet’s internet traffic is now made up of AI bots, according to Kate Johnson, chief executive officer of enterprise network giant Lumen Technologies Inc., forcing executives across sectors to rethink how their companies handle everything from customer-service requests to hidden network threats.

title: Amazon to Buy Globalstar for $11.6 Billion | Bloomberg Tech 4/14/2026
snippet: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Amazon’s plan to buy satellite operator Globalstar in a $11.6 billion deal. Plus, Lucid's New Incoming CEO Silvio Napoli discusses the company’s fresh injection of capital…
contentText: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Amazon’s plan to buy satellite operator Globalstar in a $11.6 billion deal. Plus, Lucid's New Incoming CEO Silvio Napoli discusses the company’s fresh injection of capital and deeper robotaxi push. And the US Treasury Department is looking to use Anthropic's Mythos AI model to find vulnerabilities in its systems, according to a source. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Releases Cyber Model to Limited Group in Race With Mythos
snippet: OpenAI is letting a select group of users access a new artificial intelligence model that’s meant to be more adept at spotting software security vulnerabilities, one week after rival Anthropic PBC announced a limited re…
contentText: OpenAI is letting a select group of users access a new artificial intelligence model that’s meant to be more adept at spotting software security vulnerabilities, one week after rival Anthropic PBC announced a limited release of an AI tool called Mythos.

title: AI Data Center Moratorium: Balancing Energy, Community, and Growth Risks
snippet: Industry leaders analyze the proposed pause on AI data centers and the need to balance growth, sustainability, and community concerns.
contentText: Industry leaders analyze the proposed pause on AI data centers and the need to balance growth, sustainability, and community concerns.

title: Iranians Using Crypto To Navigate War, Finding Satoshi Nakamoto | Bloomberg Crypto 4/14/2026
snippet: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: TRM Labs Global Head of Policy Ari Redboard, Castle Island Management Founder Partner Nic Ca…
contentText: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: TRM Labs Global Head of Policy Ari Redboard, Castle Island Management Founder Partner Nic Carter, Jito Labs Chief Legal Officer Rebecca Rettig, and Dragonfly Head of Talent Zackary Skelly. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Criminals Claim Access to Some Data; Kraken
snippet: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Kraken, one of the world’s oldest crypto exchanges, said it’s being extorted by a criminal group that claims to have access to some clie…
contentText: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Kraken, one of the world’s oldest crypto exchanges, said it’s being extorted by a criminal group that claims to have access to some client account information. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: See Regulation Drive Certain Crypto Hiring: Zackary Skelly
snippet: Zackary Skelly, head of talent at Dragonfly, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the the crypto job market as it evolves around changing global regulation. (Source: Bloomberg)
contentText: Zackary Skelly, head of talent at Dragonfly, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the the crypto job market as it evolves around changing global regulation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Optimistic About Clarity Act: Rebecca Rettig
snippet: Rebecca Retting, chief legal officer and chief operating officer at Jito Labs, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The CLARITY Act passed the House in July 2025 but awaits Senate approval, leaving t…
contentText: Rebecca Retting, chief legal officer and chief operating officer at Jito Labs, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The CLARITY Act passed the House in July 2025 but awaits Senate approval, leaving the most sweeping US crypto market-structure reform in limbo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Crypto Rules May Look Solid, But Foundation is Weak
snippet: Bloomberg Intelligence's Dushyant Shahrawat joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The US crypto industry has made dramatic progress the past year, but key parts remain unsettled and the rulebook unfin…
contentText: Bloomberg Intelligence's Dushyant Shahrawat joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The US crypto industry has made dramatic progress the past year, but key parts remain unsettled and the rulebook unfinished -- holding back even more meaningful progress as other regions move ahead with clearer frameworks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Don't Think Adam Back is Satoshi: Nic Carter
snippet: Carter, founding partner of Castle Island Management, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Hunting for Bitcoin’s pseudonymous creator is a tried-and-true pastime in crypto. Many have tried, none have…
contentText: Carter, founding partner of Castle Island Management, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Hunting for Bitcoin’s pseudonymous creator is a tried-and-true pastime in crypto. Many have tried, none have been entirely successful. They discuss the potential identity of Satoshi Nakamoto. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump-Linked World Liberty Project Faces Investor Revolt
snippet: Bloomberg's Olga Kharif joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." World Liberty Financial, a Trump family crypto venture, is facing an investor revolt that includes billionaire backer Justin Sun, who accu…
contentText: Bloomberg's Olga Kharif joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." World Liberty Financial, a Trump family crypto venture, is facing an investor revolt that includes billionaire backer Justin Sun, who accused the project of secretly building controls that let insiders freeze token holders’ funds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Offers Limited Internet in Rare Move to Stem War Losses
snippet: Iran has started restoring limited internet connectivity to some businesses and individuals, a sign it’s seeking to mitigate the economic damage from the nationwide shutdown that started with the outbreak of war with th…
contentText: Iran has started restoring limited internet connectivity to some businesses and individuals, a sign it’s seeking to mitigate the economic damage from the nationwide shutdown that started with the outbreak of war with the US and Israel more than six weeks ago.

title: Iran Looking For Every Way To Evade Sanctions: Redbord
snippet: Ari Redbord, global head of policy and government affairs at TRM Labs, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." As a fragile US-Iran ceasefire takes shape, Tehran has signaled that payments in digital cu…
contentText: Ari Redbord, global head of policy and government affairs at TRM Labs, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." As a fragile US-Iran ceasefire takes shape, Tehran has signaled that payments in digital currency should form part of any toll system for vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz, the chokepoint through which around a fifth of the world’s oil normally flows. The logic is clear: tokens cannot be easily confiscated under sanctions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fintech SumUp Lines Up Banks for Possible London IPO
snippet: SumUp Payments Ltd. is lining up investment banks to arrange a potential initial public offering in London, according to people familiar with the matter, in what could be one of the biggest listings the UK capital has s…
contentText: SumUp Payments Ltd. is lining up investment banks to arrange a potential initial public offering in London, according to people familiar with the matter, in what could be one of the biggest listings the UK capital has seen in recent years.

title: Tech-Heavy Nasdaq 100 Eyes Best Run in Years
snippet: Tech stocks climbed higher and investors reacted to news that Amazon is seeking to buy satellite operator Globalstar in a $11.6 billion deal. Lei Qiu, head of thematic innovation equities at AllianceBernstein, joins Car…
contentText: Tech stocks climbed higher and investors reacted to news that Amazon is seeking to buy satellite operator Globalstar in a $11.6 billion deal. Lei Qiu, head of thematic innovation equities at AllianceBernstein, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos
snippet: In an interview at the Semafor World Economy summit this week, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark explained why the company was still engaged with the U.S. government while simultaneously suing them.
contentText: In an interview at the Semafor World Economy summit this week, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark explained why the company was still engaged with the U.S. government while simultaneously suing them.

title: Oracle taps Bloom for 2.8 GW of fuel cells to keep datacenter binge going
snippet: With grid hookups slow and turbines scarce, on-site power is starting to look less optional Bloom Energy says it has an expanded remit from Oracle to provide the energy for its US datacenter buildout plans with up to 2.…
contentText: With grid hookups slow and turbines scarce, on-site power is starting to look less optional Bloom Energy says it has an expanded remit from Oracle to provide the energy for its US datacenter buildout plans with up to 2.8 GW of fuel cell systems.…

title: BOE’s Bailey Urges Regulators to Assess AI Cyber Risk to Banks
snippet: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey said global regulators need to rapidly evaluate the threat posed by Anthropic’s Mythos artificial intelligence model.
contentText: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey said global regulators need to rapidly evaluate the threat posed by Anthropic’s Mythos artificial intelligence model.

title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos might be the best overall AI model for cybersecurity, but cheaper models can attain similar results, research shows — cross-examination of the frontier model raises questions on uptime and reliability
snippet: Anthropic's Mythos might be the best cybersecurity AI ever, but it's not the only one and it may well be the most expensive, raising questions about how useful it actually is, when weighed against the competition.
contentText: Anthropic's Mythos might be the best cybersecurity AI ever, but it's not the only one and it may well be the most expensive, raising questions about how useful it actually is, when weighed against the competition.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos Claims Questioned by Cybersecurity Insider
snippet: The ability of Anthropic’s Mythos AI model to uncover cyber vulnerabilities has the government and institutions worried, with a limited group of firms testing the model internally. But Jaya Baloo, COO and CISO of cyber…
contentText: The ability of Anthropic’s Mythos AI model to uncover cyber vulnerabilities has the government and institutions worried, with a limited group of firms testing the model internally. But Jaya Baloo, COO and CISO of cyber firm Aisle, says its testing shows cheap open-source models can find the same bug Anthropic has highlighted. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain
snippet: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to encourage healing.
contentText: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to encourage healing.

title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
snippet: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.
contentText: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.
